Data updated: 2026-05-04. Formats: JSON · XML · CSV

If you make money off this data, be cool and throw some back up the pipeline: buymeacoffee.com/altfantasysports

Stats are best-effort aggregations across multiple sources. Player identity is matched by name — records marked ambiguous may represent multiple individuals.
